Happy Birthday, Je! <3

Every picture here is a little piece of us — a laugh caught mid‑sentence, a quiet afternoon, a silly pose on a staircase somewhere far from home. Today I just want to hand all of them back to you, one at a time, with everything I feel written underneath.

Tap each photo to flip it and read my message. 💌
-Pearlas
✨ click / tap a photo ✨
🌸✨🌸

If I could wish you anything this year, it would be this: may every dream you're chasing find its way into your hands, exactly when you need it to. You work so hard and care so deeply, and the world is lucky to have someone like you in it — kind without asking for anything back, funny without even trying, and strong in ways you probably don't even notice about yourself.

Whoever you become, whatever path you choose, I just hope I get to stand beside you and watch it happen. Happy birthday, Je. I'm so proud of you, and I'm so glad I get to love you.

-Pearlas
made with love, just for you 🤍
